arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Liverpool make Haaland enquiry; Man Utd consider Gomes reunion
arts.sum: Liverpool and PSG have reached out to Erling Haaland over a future move, but the striker would prefer to head to Barcelona if he leaves Manchester City. Liverpool could rival Newcastle for Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, who seems unlikely to sign a new contract at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup
arts.sum: Manchester United look to continue the momentum of back-to-back wins when Erik ten Hag’s team travel to face Crystal Palace on Saturday evening. After the disappointment of a heavy defeat to Liverpool before the international break, the Red Devils have regrouped impressively with comprehensive wins over Southampton and Barnsley. arts.ttl: Rennes predicted XI vs Lens: Jota injured, Naouirou Ahamada debuts
arts.sum: Stade Rennais have endured a mixed start to the campaign. Victories over Olympique Lyonnais and Montpellier HSC have sandwiched two defeats in a row to RC Strasbourg Alsace and Stade…

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United – Match Preview
arts.sum: The venue for Saturday evening’s kick-off is Selhurst Park this weekend, as Crystal Palace entertain Manchester United under the lights. Both sides progressed into the fourth round of the Carabao Cup in midweek, with United thrashing League One outfit Barnsley 7-0 and Palace narrowly edging out Queens Park Rangers. arts.ttl: Timeline for Erik ten Hag’s sacking revealed as Man United hierarchy turn the screw
arts.sum: Man United manager, Erik ten Hag, is under intense pressure at Old Trafford, and it’s now been revealed just how quickly the board will act should results not improve. arts.ttl: 'A love story' - Manchester United told alternative plan to controversial Old Trafford demolition
arts.sum: Norwegian company Vill Arkitektur spoke to the MEN again as plans to build a new Old Trafford accelerate.

arts.ttl: Man Utd missed out on blockbuster transfer with player turning down move
arts.sum: Manchester United went on a major recruitment push in the summer transfer window but failed in their attempts to bring one of manager Erik ten Hag's top targets to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United will be aiming for a third successive victory this weekend when they travel to Crystal Palace in the Premier League. Man Utd predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace (4-2-3-1) : Onana; Mazraoui, De Ligt, Martinez, Dalot; Mainoo, Ugarte; Garnacho, Fernandes, Rashford; Zirkzee.

arts.ttl: Two Manchester United players hold the key to ending staggering nine-month Premier League streak
arts.sum: Man United travel to Selhurst Park to face Crystal Palace today and they head to London after a positive week.

arts.ttl: Pundits disagree on Crystal Palace vs Man Utd score as 'absolutely terrible' key man identified
arts.sum: Pundits Mark Lawrenson, Paul Merson and Chris Sutton have made their predictions for Manchester United's trip to Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday evening
